transcript.text:
[Chanting 'salmon']
[2.5kg of salmon]
[Salmon+Ramen?]
[Salmon Mukbang]
[Dreams come true]
Hello everyone
I'm on my way to the countryside (south)
I stopped by Dangjin (city) because I was hungry
I don't think I've had salmon lately
So I'm here to have some
They sell salmon and ramen together
We'll make salmon the main dish
with ramen on the side
Salmon! Salmon! Salmon!
It's been so long
[Kyouno Restaurant located in Eupnae-dong]

Hello
Salmon
Extra large raw salmon sashimi
Today's not Salmon Day, but since I love salmon...
Excuse me
Salmon sashimi
6 of those
6 of the sashimi? Yes
1 salmon donburi (sashimi bowl with rice)
And 1 tonkotsu (pork) ramen as well
[Kelp-fermented salmon]
[Raw salmon sashimi]
[Raw salmon donburi]
[Mayu (black garlic oil) Tonkotsu Ramen]
Thank you
Do you guys usually give this much ramen?

[Today's main]
Thank you
[Salmon]
All of this?
I'd be impressed if you can eat 1 or 2 rows of this
I can eat it all
[No way]
Looks so good
This is 2 servings each plate
It may not seem like it but look at the thickness
Never seen salmon cut this thick
So thick Amazing
Bon appetit
Salmon
Bon appetit
It tastes different from normal salmon sashimi

It's because it's stored in a certain way
It's delicious
Wait a min
Found a real gem
Look at the size It's filled to the brim
Hopefully not because it's me
The broth is the most important
[Soup inspection]
[Okay this is it]
[Can't stop drinking the soup]
It's a very thick broth
Very flavorful
1 Chashu as well (braised pork)
Take a look It's so thick
Salmon
3 of them

It's fun to eat The texture is great
The size is perfect for me
[So she takes 3 pieces]
I like belly meat, but the tail is tasty too
This must be the so-called 'fermented salmon'
[I've found out how good it is]
I came to the right place
You can't go wrong with salmon
But I love eating it in thick pieces
It's insane
Excuse me
Do you know the weight in grams?
That's almost 2/3 of the salmon
Is that so? [Calculating]
So well over 2kgs
Well over, right? Yes for sure

[Just about right to fill me up]
It tastes because it's fermented, right?
Right If it's not fermented, the texture is not the same and it's a little fishy
Fermenting it gives it a chewy texture
Having them cut into thick pieces is a game-changer
He said I would probably eat 1 row of this
I've already finished 1 row
[Thumbs up]
The thickness is unreal
It's as thick as 1 phalanx of the index finger
The distal phalanx (top part)
Anyways, it's really amazing
I finished it before it got bloated
I get happy every time I look at the thickness of the salmon
Just raises my level of happiness
Salmon is always delicious

Is this forreal?
Amazing
With some wasabi
A little bit
On top
I've gotten into wasabi recently I didn't really use to eat it
I love days when I can eat lots of salmon
1 piece is big enough to fill up your mouth
So it's actually a lot more food than expected
Salmon's unique marbling
Over here
Some wasabi
This is horseradish
Horseradish, right? [Yes]
With onions
Dip it in sauce

It's much better
Salmon donburi
Go away, you!
There's even more salmon underneath the onions
What? There's so many
Very thick
[Instructions on how to eat it properly]
I'm not supposed to mix it
I've ruined it already
What now?
I'm sorry salmon
This isn't how it's supposed to be
Dip it in soy sauce,
Wasabi on top
I already mixed it in
I don't even know how to properly eat a donburi

I wonder what they ate that got them this fatty
[Excited]
Grab 2 pieces
Dip it in
[Mouth full of happiness]
That's a mouthful
3 of them together
I can't do 4 pieces
3 is the limit
Maybe it tastes better with soy sauce
Should I try 4?
[Is it possible?]
[Splash]
[It overflows] I spilled it all
Let's go These pieces are a little thinner
That seemed easier than the previous 3 Those were probably thicker

I've been eating it with wasabi
Go it's time for a little bit of ginger
Just about this much
I've got a bad feeling about this
[Astonished]
[Help me]
[Urgent care]
Ginger is not it
Dip in sauce
This is a lot of food
Really Like really
Very much
So 2 plates are on that 1 plate pretty much
2 people share 1 plate
So 1 of your plate is 4 servings worth
Which makes it 12 servings total

So this is all 12 servings of sashimi? Yes
Look at that thickness
It's unbelievable
[So good]
[No matter]
[how much]
[I eat it]
[She's been a little too quiet]
The reason why I'm eating it quickly without saying anything
is because it's almost 10pm (closing earlier than usual due to covid)
I came here pretty late
Let's speed it up
10 minutes left
[Must keep going]
[She tried her best]
There's 3 minutes left

So I have to stop here
I'll to-go the leftovers
I always end up eating late meals because I try to avoid lunch/dinner hours
So I feel like there's never enough time for me to eat
I hope covid ends so that I can stay longer to eat more foods
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
